headline: Assessing Enerflex (TSX:EFX) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot Enerflex (TSX:EFX) has drawn fresh attention after a recent pullback of about 2.8% in the latest session, following a stretch of positive returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Enerflex. That pullback comes after a strong run, with a 7 day share price return of 5.84%, a 90 day share price return of 39.17%, and a 1 year total shareholder return of 240.09%. This points to momentum that has been building rather than fading. If...
